description:
A botnet is spamming your server with fake account creations. As the System Administrator, you must immediately disable public user registration to stop the attack.

Steps:
1. Log in to Rocket.Chat as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost:3000
2. Navigate to Administration > Settings > Accounts
3. Find the 'Registration' section
4. Change 'Registration Form' to 'Disabled'
5. Save your changes
